nasb.text: David did not leave a man or a woman alive to bring to Gath, saying, “Otherwise they will tell about us, saying, ‘So has David done and so has been his practice all the time he has lived in the country of the Philistines.’ ”

esv.text: And David would leave neither man nor woman alive to bring news to Gath, thinking, “lest they should tell about us and say, ‘So David has done.’” Such was his custom all the while he lived in the country of the Philistines.

cnv.text: 無論男女，大衛都不讓一人活著帶到迦特來，他說：“恐怕他們把我們的事告訴別人，說：‘大衛作了這樣的事，他住在非利士人鄉鎮的日子，常常這樣作。’”

ccb.text: 大卫把那地方的人都杀掉，一个也不带到迦特，因为他害怕他们会泄露真相。大卫在非利士人那里居住的时候，常常这样做。
